D:\pytorch\envs\pytorch\Lib\site-packages\cmake\data\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\HowToConnectSignalAndSlot.dir/objects.a
D:\QT\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\HowToConnectSignalAndSlot.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\HowToConnectSignalAndSlot.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\QT\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\g++.exe -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\HowToConnectSignalAndSlot.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o HowToConnectSignalAndSlot.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libHowToConnectSignalAndSlot.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\HowToConnectSignalAndSlot.dir\linkLibs.rsp
